emocio.desired_transformation: expanded horizon with vivid movement and retained footing
emocio.main_obstacle: closed horizon beside an emptied budget marker

instinkt.minimum_safety_condition: option-specific consequence evidence remains within the sealed packet scope

causal_sequence: The travel offer has a very short expiration window and is non-refundable.
Booking the trip consumes a significant portion of available discretionary funds.
The rarity of the route suggests a low probability of future availability.
Future financial obligations are uncertain, creating a risk for the budget if the trip is booked.
racio.explicit_goal: Decide whether to book a rare non-refundable trip, take a local alternative, or stay home.
facts_used: The travel offer expires in four hours and is non-refundable after booking.
The trip cost is 38 percent of the currently discretionary budget.
The same route was available once during the last three years.
racio.main_objection: The high cost relative to the budget combined with unknown future expenses makes a non-refundable commitment risky.
racio.uncertainty: The decision balances the extreme rarity of the opportunity against potential financial instability next month.
unknowns: Whether other major costs will arise next month is unknown.
How satisfying the trip would be is unknown.
utility_structure: High utility from securing a rare experience
Low utility from budget depletion if future costs emerge
Moderate utility from local travel as a compromise
Safe utility from saving funds by staying home
